title: Lovely Spicy German Sweet Red Peppers Skewers
description: A romantic German dish featuring sweet red peppers, this recipe is perfect for a special occasion, with a spicy kick and a high-protein twist.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper, if using.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken, sweet red peppers, and onion onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the peppers are tender.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
To serve, brush the skewers with a little olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
